# meok-c2pa-durable-mcp

> MEOK C2PA Durable Content Credentials MCP — C2PA 2.2 with soft + hard binding (Digimarc-compatible). Survives compression / crop / screenshot. First-mover before Adobe ships. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- build_durable_manifest
- build_soft_binding
- merge_hard_and_soft
- verify_durable_manifest
- list_soft_binding_methods
- sign_cose1_envelope

## Install
```
pip install meok-c2pa-durable-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-c2pa-durable-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
